title: stachys betonica
intro: Stachys betonica, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers and square stems. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches and digestive issues. The health benefits of wood betony include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related disorders and sleep issues. Wood betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
